ops.title: cc-notes unification Phases 2-3: CLI unification + self-healing errors
ops.description: Full flag unification (runbook anchors/rm/search, binder sweep, freeText everywhere, --note on criterion met/failed, MarkFlags* constraints, project activate, mount subcommands, top-level search) plus self-healing errors (accepted-flags listing, sibling-capability scan, synonyms, underscore mapping, version-aware unknown command, arity shapes). Plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/there-are-lots-of-steady-frost.md (Phases 2-3). Blocked by Phase 1 (storage core) landing first.

ops.text: TestAnchoredKindsUniform green: identical anchor quartet/octet/filters across note/doc/log/runbook

All original failure shapes fixed or self-healing: runbook add --branch works; task comment --body works; --tags/--file/--evidence get did-you-mean plus accepted-flags line; task_list suggests task list; top-level search works; arity errors show positional shape; stale binary gets version hint
MarkFlags* constraints render in --help and keep exit code 2 (pinned classify tripwire test)
vocabulary.golden regenerated deliberately with diff reviewed; full go test -race -count=1 ./... green
